[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 000100111 4
1 011111101 7
2 111111111 a
3 101001111 6
4 100111111 7
5 100111111 7
6 011111111 8
7 111111111 a

12 21 100000101 3
23 32 100001000 2
